name: Mold-Tek Packaging Limited
summary: Mold-Tek Packaging Limited manufactures and sells plastic packaging containers in India. It provides sanitizer containers, dispensing pumps, food containers, paint packaging products, lubricant packs, and bulk packaging products. The company was formerly known as Moldtek Plastics Limited and changed its name to Mold-Tek Packaging Limited in March 2010. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
